page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr9i.xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 4 dedicated physical cores with 1 thread per core, utilizing the Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor running at a clock speed of 3.4 GHz. The instance is equipped with 32.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core.

This instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, meaning all storage requirements must be met via external network-attached volumes. It provides a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps and does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The lack of local storage and hardware acceleration represents a tradeoff, positioning the instance away from heavy storage-I/O or graphics-intensive workloads.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation and high memory density make this instance profile suitable for memory-intensive workloads that do not require local disk caching. Appropriate workloads include in-memory databases, caching layers, enterprise applications, and memory-heavy data processing tasks that fit within the 32.0 GB memory envelope.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr9i.xlarge is an x86_64 memory-optimized server instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It features 4 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor operating at 3.4 GHz, with 1 thread per core. The instance is configured with 32.0 GB of RAM, establishing a high resource density of 8.0 GB of memory per core. It does not include local storage or GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps. This hardware profile is designed for memory-intensive workloads such as in-memory databases, caching layers, and enterprise applications that require dedicated CPU resources but do not demand local disk I/O or graphics acceleration.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr9i.xlarge is a memory-optimized server featuring 4 dedicated Intel Xeon physical cores at 3.4 GHz, 32 GB of RAM, 4 Gbps network bandwidth, and no local storage.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual server featuring dedicated Intel Xeon cores and high memory density for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
